description: submitted fires on submit-form attempt (§55.7). Submitting #f flips the compound signup.submitted true; crucially, no field's touched flips (submit is compound-level and orthogonal to per-field touched) — the §55.7 timing distinction.
rationale: §55.7 submitted is compound-level and becomes true on the first submit-form attempt. This case pins the ORTHOGONALITY: a form submit sets submitted but leaves every field's touched at its prior value (here still false) — submit is not a per-field interaction.
